_comment: Canonical ATP Mandate — Journey Coordinator mandate for Azusa Journey
_format: atp-mandate+jwt (Ed25519 signed — this file shows the decoded payload)
_note: In production, this is a signed JWT. The public key for verification is in the Party Registry entry for myauberge-hotel.

atp._authority_level_note: Level 2 — operational. Can update and cancel. Cannot autonomously confirm (CONFIRMATION hard cap).
atp._delegation_ceiling_note: Narrowing property: this mandate may issue sub-mandates at Level 1 or Level 2 only. Cannot issue Level 3+.

_verification.verify_with_public_key: Party Registry entry for myauberge-hotel → cryptography.public_key
_verification.verify_booking_binding: payload.atp.booking_object_id must match the Booking Object being transitioned
_verification.verify_confirmation_cap: CONFIRM transition must NOT be in permitted_transitions for autonomous agent mandates
